content:
I'm Krishnan, a Full Stack Developer passionate about building immersive and performant web experiences.

This portfolio is built with React, Three.js, modern animations, and Netlify Functions powering an AI portfolio assistant. It showcases my featured projects, technical skills, and interactive UI/UX experiments.

Technologies used include React, JavaScript, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, Netlify Functions, REST APIs, and responsive design.

I'm actively looking to connect with developers, recruiters, and clients interested in modern frontend and full-stack development.

Portfolio: [https://krishnan-showcase.netlify.app/]

LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/krishnan-p-]
